title: Authentication, Passwords, Sessions, Cookies, and JOSE · Type Forensics
summary: An incident engineer receives a plausible but broken credential verification and principal-construction contract; preserve the failing exchange, locate the first causal Node or Express boundary, and retain a regression probe. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in credential verification and principal-construction contract and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging,…
objectives: Apply modern password hashing, salt, work policy, input bounds, constant-behavior comparison, breach and reset controls, rehash migration, and secret separation.
Generate opaque session identifiers, store server-side state, rotate at authentication and privilege changes, expire idle and absolute lifetime, revoke, and prevent fixation.
Use jose verification with explicit algorithms, trusted keys, issuer, audience, expiration, not-before, clock tolerance, token type, and bounded claim validation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Node and Express server Inspect the failure record · Debug Password Verifier Policy
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug team handles case 6958 in a multi-tenant case service with a bounded PostgreSQL pool. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to validate bounded token claims and session rotation before constructing a principal; reject a replay before any external effect; then abort during a dependency phase and preserve cleanup plus response ownership. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Apply modern password hashing, salt, work policy, input bounds, constant-behavior comparison, breach and reset controls, rehash migration, and secret separation.

Inspect the Password Verifier Policy trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

For Node and Express server Inspect the failure record · Debug Password Verifier Policy, keep Password Verifier Policy connected to executable HTTP client decision evidence.

Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to validate bounded token claims and session rotation before constructing a principal; reject a replay before any external effect; then change the method and preserve both status and durable-effect evidence. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Construct the smallest principal after full credential validation and record redacted success, failure class, rotation, revocation, and recovery evidence.

For Node and Express server Publish the incident record · Debug Authentication Principal Audit, challenge the documented misconception with request, response, fault, policy, and transfer evidence: An authenticated principal is authorized for every operation its token can name.
